concept: Dream-punk seaside resort on a tidal poster coast
scene: A mid-century travel-poster vista shows a fantastical coastal promenade at dusk, where a stylish seaside market meets a tidal dreamscape. In the foreground, simplified shopfront terraces and display windows echo a chic boutique interior, while elegant adult figures in narrow suits browse papers beneath poster-lined walls. Beside the walkway stands a tall glowing lantern-jar filled with tiny luminous insects, rendered as a civic beacon. A rose-and-ribbon mural and a small hanging cruciform charm appear as decorative street emblems on the promenade architecture. In the middle ground, the beach opens into shallow reflective water where neat rows of iron bedsteads become surreal cabanas stretching toward the horizon, with a few compact radio-shaped kiosks and speaker towers set among them like resort huts. A sleek adult singer silhouette performs at a bandstand, backed by giant stylised flowers and splash-like foliage integrated into the dunes. Above, a red hang glider cuts across a vast cream-to-violet sky, while in the far background a monumental circular eagle crest is reimagined as a lighthouse medallion on the cliff, its branch and bat transformed into balanced ornamental icons. Subtle geometric overlays and the profile of a wolf-like face are worked into clouds and reflected water as poster shapes, tying the whole coast into one bold, unified destination.
prompt: Create one mid-century travel poster illustration - simplified geometry, stylised light, smooth gradient skies, flat confident shapes, and absolutely no lettering. Weave in recognisable elements taken from the 8 uploaded album covers: source 1: glowing insect-filled glass jar; source 2: rose tattoo motif; source 3: rows of beds in shallow seaside water with a red hang glider; source 4: cluster of boomboxes; source 5: singer with microphone framed by oversized flowers; source 6: spread-winged eagle crest; source 7: wolf-like face with translucent geometric overlays; source 8: stylish boutique interior with adults reading papers. Transform the subjects, figures, creatures, objects, and symbols depicted in the uploaded covers so they stay recognisable, and place them all inside one cohesive world with a single shared setting and consistent light. Stylise each album motif into the poster world - as landmarks, vehicles, figures, flora, or emblems drawn in the same simplified poster language. Composition: One heroic vista with a strong horizon, a big sky, and clear foreground, middle-ground, and background bands. Colour direction: cream, teal, coral, ochre, faded violet - warm faded lithograph colours - cream, teal, coral, ochre - tuned to the sleeves. Mood: restless, romantic, surreal, and celebratory. Keep the scene safe and tasteful: feature only adults (no children, infants, or minors), and show no gore, wounds, body horror, medical or anatomical imagery, blank or milky eyes, nudity, or sexual content. Reinterpret any such source motif abstractly, and suggest rather than exactly replicate the likeness of any identifiable real person. Do not include any text, letters, words, numbers, captions, titles, logos, watermarks, or signage anywhere in the image. Avoid: readable text, letters, words, numbers, captions, titles, logos, watermarks, signage, grid layout, contact sheet, evenly tiled squares, raw album-cover thumbnails, collage of separate panels, photorealistic photograph, DSLR photo, 3D render, CGI, octane render, glossy 3D rendering, camera depth of field, lens bokeh, realistic skin texture, a posed group of people arranged for the camera, objects displayed on tables, trays, or plinths, one giant central sculpture as the centrepiece of the scene. Bold, confident, gallery-quality print design with a strong sense of place.
